title: Trowel Future
description: A tiny QoL mod to make placing random blocks less tedious. Fork of Trowel by TheEnderCore
body:
Trowel Future adds a handy new building tool to Minecraft: the Trowel. This item allows players to place blocks by letting them randomly place any block from their hotbar with a single click. It's forked from [Trowel](https://modrinth.com/mod/trowel) by TheEnderCore

### Changes
- Removed dependence on [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- 1.16.5 Backport
- 1.14.4 Backport
- 1.12.2 Forge Backport
